description: Phase 13 - Testing Commands (Makefile): Create a Makefile at the repo root with standard development targets
steps: make test - run all tests: npx vitest run && cd artifacts/edms && npx vitest run
make typecheck - TypeScript check: npx tsc --noEmit
make lint - Biome lint: npx biome lint .
make build - production build: cd artifacts/edms && npx vite build
make test-e2e - placeholder that echoes instructions for setting up E2E tests with Playwright
make benchmark-search - run search benchmark script (reference scripts/ directory or echo placeholder)
make benchmark-ocr - placeholder that echoes OCR benchmark instructions
make doctor - run preflight checks: make typecheck && make lint && make test && make build
make backup-test - placeholder that echoes backup verification instructions
make ci - full CI pipeline locally: make lint && make typecheck && make test && make build
Include a help target (make help) that lists all available targets with descriptions
Commit with: chore: add Makefile with development and CI targets
acceptance_criteria: Makefile exists at repo root with all specified targets
make test runs all tests successfully
make ci runs the full pipeline (lint may warn but not fail the make target)
All placeholder targets echo descriptive instructions
